statement.informal: `aqi_in_band` satisfies its @verify contract: under preconditions (concentration >= c_low ∧ concentration <= c_high ∧ c_low >= 0.0 ∧ c_low < c_high ∧ c_high <= C_MAX ∧ aqi_low >= 0.0 ∧ aqi_low < aqi_high ∧ aqi_high <= AQI_MAX), the function's result satisfies (result >= aqi_low ∧ result <= aqi_high). This is the obligation Forge ships to a Lean target for DO-178C / IEC-61508 / ISO-26262 certification evidence.
statement.formal_lean:
